_fixture_notes: Case 19: Derived component external_ref collides with parent external_ref. Both are 'colliding-slug'. Spec rules require derived component slugs to be unique. This fixture intentionally violates that rule. Tests whether the validator catches the collision and how the error is surfaced.
name: Tomato Pasta with Identical-Slug Component
description: Parent and derived component share the same external_ref. Intentional violation for validator-rejection testing.

steps.title: Make the sauce
steps.content: Heat {0001}, add {0002}, then {0003}. Simmer 15 minutes. Stir in {0004}.

steps.title: Cook the pasta
steps.content: Boil {0005} until al dente. Drain and toss with the sauce.

derived_components.name: Tomato Sauce (Collision)
derived_components.description: Identical external_ref to parent — should be rejected.
